conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 7 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: ORR - N (%) | Treatment | Overall
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm showed overall response (complete or partial response) of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document focuses on overall survival (OS), biochemical progression-free survival (bPFS), and radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS). It does not report overall response rates (complete or partial response percentages) for the treatment arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Objective Response Rate (ORR) with N (%) for the treatment arm was not found in the document after reviewing all available pages and performing targeted searches for ORR, Complete Response, Stable Disease, and Progressive Disease."
